title: ROOT Stock Earnings: Root Beats EPS, Beats Revenue for Q1 2024
text: Root Insurance exceeded analyst expectations in its first quarter 2024 results, announced on April 30, 2024. The company delivered an earnings per share of -$0.42, significantly outperforming the analyst consensus estimate of -$2.48. This represents a substantial beat on the bottom line. Root generated $254.90 million in quarterly sales, substantially surpassing projections and coming in 24.78% better than the analyst estimate for revenue of $204.28 million. Root's earnings report demonstrated stronger-than-expected operational performance across both earnings and revenue metrics. The insurance provider notably exceeded Wall Street's expectations for the quarter. For the first time, the company reported a positive quarterly operating income of $5 million and positive adjusted EBITDA of $15 million. These metrics improved $35 million and $26 million year-over-year, respectively.
